title: Enhance AI solutions with Azure Managed Redis
summary: Learn how to use Azure Managed Redis to enhance your AI solutions, including caching strategies, data operations, event messaging, and vector storage.

sections.title: Enhance AI solutions with Azure Managed Redis
sections.summary: Learn how to use Azure Managed Redis to enhance your AI solutions, including caching strategies, data operations, event messaging, and vector storage.

lessons.title: Implement data operations in Azure Managed Redis
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement data operations in Azure Managed Redis.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-data-operations-azure-managed-redis/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement data operations in Azure Managed Redis

lessons.title: Implement event messaging with Azure Managed Redis
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement event messaging with Azure Cache for Redis and Azure Managed Redis, including pub/sub for real-time notifications and Streams for reliable task processing.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-event-messaging-azure-managed-redis/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement event messaging with Azure Managed Redis

lessons.title: Implement vector storage in Azure Managed Redis
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement vector storage and similarity search in Azure Managed Redis.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-vector-storage-azure-managed-redis/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement vector storage in Azure Managed Redis

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Enhance AI solutions with Azure Managed Redis
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Enhance AI solutions with Azure Managed Redis**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
